untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external data not in allowed indicators: (1) Commercial hedger position weighting data - not available in price/technical indicators; (2) Small speculator position data - not available in price/technical indicators; (3) Position directionality comparison between two external data sources. The signal is fundamentally based on Commitment of Traders (COT) report positioning data, which is not a price-based or volume-based technical indicator. Cannot be translated using only OHLCV and derived technical indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_14 is a macro/sentiment-based signal requiring COT (Commitment of Traders) positioning data. This requires: (a) access to institutional/commercial hedger long/short ratios, (b) small speculator positioning data, and (c) correlation logic between these external sources. No allowed indicators can proxy these fundamental position metrics. Consider: (1) Adding COT indicators to the allowed list, or (2) Using a surrogate like unusual volume spikes (vol_ratio_20) combined with price reversals, though this would not capture the original signal logic.
